potential_missing.source_sentence: The customer goes to the shop and purchases the medicine required.
The Online Pharmacy is easy to use and order.
The business goal for the application is to provide the medicines to all the people and admin will provide the supplier details .

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Before it, the customer needs to create a login account and fill all the details like name, address, any id no, etc.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall require customers to create a login account and provide necessary personal information.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The business goal for the application is to provide the medicines to all the people and admin will provide the supplier details (Figures 24.1–24.20).
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall include functionality for administrators to input supplier details.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The customer goes to the shop and purchases the medicine required. So a lot of time is wasted and the person gets tired.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement does not align with the system requirements but rather describes an external process.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The customer selects the required medicines and orders them with a single click.
ambiguities.reason: This statement is somewhat ambiguous as it does not specify if the selection of medicines happens before or after logging in.
